funFacts: Saber-toothed Tiger could open its jaws up to an angle of 120 degrees—twice as wide as a modern lion.
Saber-toothed Tiger (Smilodon) lived during the Pleistocene epoch (Ice Age) and was characterized by its 7-inch curved canine teeth.
